Package ch.njol.skript.test.utils

package ch.njol.skript.test.utils
Utils for script-based testing.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    TestOfflinePlayer
    A wrapper for an OfflinePlayer and a custom PlayerProfile.
    TestResults
    Contains test results: successes, failures and doc failure.
